---
title: "Home"
title-block: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-grid}
::: {.hero-copy}
<span class="eyebrow">Economics PhD Candidate</span>

# Tommaso Crosta

I am a third-year PhD student in Economics at Bocconi University. My research sits at the intersection of development and labour economics, with a focus on how institutions and social protection shape labour market outcomes.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Research](Research/index.qmd){.btn .btn-brand}
[Download CV](cv/CV-Tommaso Crosta.pdf){.btn .btn-ghost}
[Email](mailto:tommaso.crosta@phd.unibocconi.it){.btn .btn-ghost}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-portrait}
![](img/my_image.jpeg){.portrait-image alt="Portrait of Tommaso Crosta"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-section}
## Selected Work

A snapshot of current research on workplace institutions, social protection, and evidence synthesis.

::: {.paper-grid}
::: {.paper-entry .featured-paper}
### Union Delegates Incentives and Firm-level Outcomes
<span class="paper-meta">with Francesco Armillei | Working paper</span>

A study of how the electoral accountability of workplace union representatives affects employment outcomes, bargaining content, and within-firm inequality.

::: {.link-row}
[Working papers](Research/index.qmd#working-papers){.paper-link}
:::
:::

::: {.paper-entry}
### Unconditional Cash Transfers: A Bayesian Meta-Analysis of 50 Randomized Evaluations in 26 Low- and Middle-Income Countries
<span class="paper-meta">Working paper</span>

A Bayesian meta-analysis of unconditional cash transfer programs that evaluates average impacts and tests key policy mechanisms across settings.

::: {.link-row}
[Press coverage](Research/index.qmd#talks-press){.paper-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-section}
## Research Interests

::: {.theme-grid}
::: {.theme-card}
### Social Security

Social protection, household welfare, and the design of policies that shape economic opportunity in low- and middle-income countries.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
### Labour Economics

How automation is reshaping industrial relations and labour markets in low- and middle-income countries.
:::

::: {.theme-card}
### Bayesian Methods

Applications of Bayesian statistics to applied microeconomics, meta-analysis, and evidence synthesis.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.content-section .contact-section}
## Contact

I am always happy to hear from researchers, students, and potential collaborators.

::: {.contact-links}
[Email](mailto:tommaso.crosta@phd.unibocconi.it){.btn .btn-brand}
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tommaso-crosta-31873817b/){.btn .btn-ghost}
[X](https://x.com/TommasoCrosta){.btn .btn-ghost}
:::
:::
